itinerary.title: Departure from India to Paris
itinerary.description: Board your flight from India to Paris. Upon arrival, enjoy a private airport transfer to check into your hotel. Spend the evening relaxing, or optionally enjoy a scenic cruise along the Seine River.

itinerary.title: Guided Paris City Tour
itinerary.description: Discover the main landmarks of Paris, including the Eiffel Tower up to the second level, Arc de Triomphe, and the famous avenue of Champs-Elysees. Stop for photos outside the Louvre Museum and view the historic Notre-Dame Cathedral. In the evening, there is an option to attend the Lido Show.

itinerary.title: Travel to Lucerne
itinerary.description: Embark on a scenic road trip across the borders to Switzerland. Take a brief stop in Geneva or Bern if time permits. Arrive in the lakeside city of Lucerne for a brief orientation tour and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Mount Titlis and Lucerne City Excursion
itinerary.description: Ride the world's first rotating cable car, the Rotair, to the summit of Mount Titlis. Enjoy optional snow activities. In the afternoon, return to Lucerne to see Chapel Bridge, the Lion Monument, and take a stroll along the lakeside promenade.

itinerary.title: Interlaken and Lauterbrunnen Excursion
itinerary.description: Spend the day at leisure or choose an optional mountain rail excursion to Jungfraujoch (Top of Europe). Alternatively, explore the scenic resort town of Interlaken and the waterfall-rich Lauterbrunnen valley.

itinerary.title: Travel from Switzerland to Venice Mestre
itinerary.description: Drive through the Swiss Alps and across the Italian border. Check into your hotel in Venice Mestre, and enjoy the evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Venice Sightseeing and Journey to Florence
itinerary.description: Take a classic vaporetto water bus ride to St. Mark's Square. See the historic St. Mark's Basilica, view Doge's Palace from the outside, and watch an authentic glass-blowing demonstration before driving to Florence.

itinerary.title: Florence Sightseeing and Drive to Rome
itinerary.description: Take a morning tour of Florence to view the Piazza Michelangelo and the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (Duomo). In the afternoon, travel south to Rome, visiting the historic Trevi Fountain and Spanish Steps.

itinerary.title: Vatican City and Historic Rome City Tour
itinerary.description: Take a guided tour of Vatican City to explore St. Peter's Basilica. Afterwards, view the iconic Colosseum and Roman Forum from outside, and enjoy the lively atmosphere of Piazza Navona.

itinerary.title: Rome to Innsbruck via Verona
itinerary.description: Drive north to Austria, stopping briefly in Verona to see the famous balcony of Romeo and Juliet. Continue through the Brenner Pass to Innsbruck, and enjoy an evening orientation tour of the Old Town and the Golden Roof.

itinerary.title: Munich City Stop and Drive to Amsterdam
itinerary.description: Depart Innsbruck for Munich, Germany. Tour the historic Marienplatz and see the BMW Headquarters from outside. Continue your journey across Germany to Amsterdam for check-in.

itinerary.title: Amsterdam Canal Cruise and Departure
itinerary.description: Visit the historic windmills of Zaanse Schans, tour a cheese and clog making factory, and enjoy a scenic boat cruise along the canals. In the afternoon, transfer to the airport for your return flight back to India.

title: Grand Europe Tour
description: Explore the best of Europe in 12 days across 6 spectacular countries - France, Switzerland, Italy, Austria, Germany, and the Netherlands. Perfect for travelers seeking iconic landmarks, rich culture, and historic sights in one comprehensive, guided journey.
highlights: Ascend Mount Titlis via the rotating Rotair cable car
Gondola and water taxi excursions in historic Venice
Guided sightseeing at Vatican City and St. Peter's Basilica
Explore the scenic windmills and canals of Amsterdam
